ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., sensor, gateway) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the device */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the device's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the device's location */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the device's information was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the device's firmware or software */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES device_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the device resides */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the device resides */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the device resides */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area within the city where the device is located */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street where the device resides */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the device type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES action_types ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the action type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
